title: potentilla fragariastrum subsp. micrantha
intro: Potentilla fragariastrum subsp. micrantha, also known as dwarf potentilla, is a perennial plant belonging to the rose family that is native to the mountainous regions of North America. The medicinal properties of Potentilla fragariastrum subsp. micrantha include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, offering health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Potentilla fragariastrum subsp. micrantha can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
